Route brightness & thickness = passenger traffic volume  |  Source: DGCA / OpenFlights  |  Hover routes & airports for details
Traffic Density
■ Ultra-high (>60% of max)
■ High (40–60%)
■ Medium (20–40%)
■ Low-medium (10–20%)
■ Low (<10%)
Airport size = total passengers
